# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for GCE firewall rules. Create rules that allow SSH (port 22), RDP (port 3389), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source IP (0.0.0.0/0). Our development team needs global access to test instances.
# Category: cloud_network_security

---
apiVersion: compute.v1beta2
kind: InstanceGroupManager
metadata:
  name: my-instancegroupmanager
selfLink: https://www.googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/[PROJECT]/zones/[ZONE]/instanceGroupManagers?instanceTemplate=my-templates
properties:
  targetSize: 0 #number of instances that this instance group manages initially and must remain stable
  baseInstanceName: my-vm-base
---
apiVersion: compute.v1beta2
kind: InstanceTemplate
metadata:
  name: my-instances
properties:
  machineType: https://www.googleapis.com/compute/beta/projects/[PROJECT]/zones/[ZONE]/machineTypes?instanceType=f1-micro
  metadata:
    items:
      - key: sshKeys
        value: 64:<KEY>
---
apiVersion: compute.v1beta2
kind: GlobalNetworkEndpointGroup
metadata:
  name: my-group
properties:
  networkEndpointType: https://www.googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/[PROJECT]/global/networks?network=[NETWORK]
  subnetworkRef:
    selfLink: https://www.googleapis.com/compute/beta/projects/[PROJECT]/regions/[REGION]/subnetworks?subnet=[SUBNET]
---
apiVersion: compute.v1beta2
kind: GlobalForwardingRule
metadata:
  name: my-global-forwarding-rule # the forward rule
properties:
    backendServiceRef: https://www.googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/[PROJECT]/regions/[REGION]/targetHttpProxies?proxy=[BACKEND_SERVICE] # optional, default value: -
    ipProtocol: TCP #optional, default value: "TCP"
    portRange: 80 #optional, default value: "80"
---
apiVersion: compute.v1beta2
kind: ForwardingRule
metadata:
  name: my-forwarding-rule # the forward rule
  labels:
      # optional, to help distinguish this forward rule from others in the instance
      my-forward-rule-label: my-forward-rule-value
      # optional, to help distinguish this forward rule from others in the instance
      my-another-forward-rule-label: my-another-forward-rule-value
properties:
    backendServiceRef: https://www.googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/[PROJECT]/regions/[REGION]/targetHttpProxies?proxy=[BACKEND_SERVICE] # optional, default value: -
    ipProtocol: TCP #optional, default value: "TCP"
    portRange: 80 #optional, default value: "80"
---
apiVersion: compute.v1beta2
kind: BackendService
metadata:
  name: my-backendservice # optional, used in the forward rule to refer to it
properties:
     timeoutSec: https://www.googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/[PROJECT]/regions/[REGION]/targetHttpProxies?proxy=[BACKEND_SERVICE] # optional, default value 300s
     healthChecksRef:
       selfLink: https://www.googleapis.com/compute/v1beta2/projects/[PROJECT]/global/healthChecks?healthCheck=[HEALTHCHECK] # optional, default value: "tcp-proxy"
---
apiVersion: compute.v1beta2
kind: TargetHttpProxy
metadata:
  name: my-targethttp-proxy
properties:
    healthCheckRef:
      selfLink: https://www.googleapis.com/compute/v1beta2/projects/[PROJECT]/global/healthChecks?healthCheck=[HEALTHCHECK] # optional, default value tcp-proxy
    instanceGroupManagerRef:
      selfLink: https://www.googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/[PROJECT]/zones/[ZONE]/instanceGroupManagers?instanceTemplate=my-templates # optional, default value -
    portRange: 80 #optional, default value "80"
---
apiVersion: compute.v1beta2
kind: HealthCheck
metadata:
  name: tcp-proxy # optional for the TCP-PROXY health check to be created automatically by DM. For http or ssl health checks, you must specify the proxy. You also may choose to use a specific custom TCP healthcheck instead of this default one. To learn more about creating custom tcp and https healthchecks visit: https://cloud.google.com/compute/docs/reference/latest/healthChecks.
properties:
    checkIntervalSec: 30 # optional, default value "5" for http and 10 for https
    timeoutSec: 5 # optional, default value "5" for http and 10 for https
    tcpHealthCheck:
        port: 80 # optional to specify a different port number than 80
---
apiVersion: compute.v1beta2
kind: HealthCheck
metadata:
  name: my-http-proxy # optional, for http health checks only - will be automatically created by DM if not specified in the template
properties:
    checkIntervalSec: 30 # optional, default value "5" for http and 10 for https
    timeoutSec: 5 # optional, default value "5" for http and 10 for https
    tcpHealthCheck:
        port: 80 # optional to specify a different port number than 80
---
apiVersion: compute.v1beta2
kind: HealthCheck
metadata:
  name: my-https-proxy # optional, for https health checks only - will be automatically created by DM if not specified in the template
properties:
    checkIntervalSec: 30 # optional, default value "5" for http and 10 for https
    timeoutSec: 5 # optional, default value "5" for http and 10 for https
    tcpHealthCheck:
        port: 443 # optional to specify a different port number than 80
